text: <par>Since <latinform>ul</latinform> already means 'hand' (see <xref ref="373">#373</xref>), Trung <latinform>kui</latinform> probably means 'right', though this is perhaps not a fatal objection to including the form here. The semantic shift HAND <--> RIGHTSIDE is quite pluasible, given that the right hand is the hand <emph>par excellence</emph>.</par>
